title: Tex Mex
description: Jake and Johnny are two friends, struggling to make ends meet in rural Texas. After Jake heads down a shaky path, Johnny consults the guidance of Father Bryson.
parent: Love and Death on Long Island
altHero: Ronnie Bostock as Johnny running through a dark warehouse next to a pile of shipping pallets
alt1: Jake pulls a knife on Johnny, who is standing in the way of two hispanic construction workers
alt3: Johnny has been stabbed, lowered to the ground by Father Bryson
